requirement_topic.en: Pressure Equipment Directive — Refrigerant Circuit Classification — Germany / EU
requirement_topic.zh: 压力设备指令——制冷剂回路分类——德国/欧盟
requirement_topic.zht: 壓力設備指令——制冷劑迴路分類——德國/歐盟

summary.en: Pressure Equipment Directive 2014/68/EU (PED) applies to heat pump refrigerant circuits as pressure equipment. Germany implemented PED via the 14th ProdSV (14. Produktsicherheitsverordnung). Classification depends on fluid group (Group 1 = flammable or toxic refrigerants such as R290; Group 2 = non-flammable, non-toxic refrigerants such as R32 and R410A), maximum allowable pressure, and volume. Category I (lowest risk) allows manufacturer self-declaration; Categories II, III, and IV require involvement of a Notified Body. EN 378 also applies for system-level refrigerating system safety. The German technical inspection association TÜV and DGUV are active in PED assessments in Germany.
summary.zh: 压力设备指令2014/68/EU（PED）将热泵制冷剂回路视为压力设备加以管理。德国通过第14号产品安全条例（14. ProdSV）实施PED。分类取决于流体组别（第1组=可燃或有毒制冷剂，如R290；第2组=不可燃、无毒制冷剂，如R32和R410A）、最高许用压力及容积。第I类（最低风险）允许制造商自我声明；第II类、第III类和第IV类须引入公告机构。EN 378同样适用于系统级制冷系统安全。德国技术监督协会TÜV和DGUV积极参与德国境内的PED评估工作。
summary.zht: 壓力設備指令2014/68/EU（PED）將熱泵制冷劑迴路視為壓力設備加以管理。德國通過第14號產品安全條例（14. ProdSV）實施PED。分類取決於流體組別（第1組=可燃或有毒制冷劑，如R290；第2組=不可燃、無毒制冷劑，如R32和R410A）、最高許用壓力及容積。第I類（最低風險）允許製造商自我聲明；第II類、第III類和第IV類須引入公告機構。EN 378同樣適用於系統級制冷系統安全。德國技術監督協會TÜV和DGUV積極參與德國境內的PED評估工作。

standards_or_laws: 14. ProdSV (14th German Product Safety Ordinance — PED implementation)

summary.en: TSG 21-2016 (Special Equipment Safety Technical Supervision Regulations for Boilers and Pressure Vessels, administered by SAMR) and GB 150.1-150.4-2011 (Pressure vessels) govern pressure vessels in China. SELO (Special Equipment Licensing Office) registration is required for certain pressure vessels. The Chinese risk classification methodology differs from PED: different boundary conditions, different inspection body roles, and SELO registration is not a CE marking equivalent.
summary.zh: TSG 21-2016（由市监总局管理的锅炉和压力容器安全技术监察规程）和GB 150.1-150.4-2011（压力容器）管辖中国境内的压力容器。特定压力容器须向特种设备许可机构（SELO）进行注册。中国风险分类方法与PED不同：边界条件不同、检验机构职能不同，SELO注册并非CE标志的等效证明。
summary.zht: TSG 21-2016（由市監總局管理的鍋爐和壓力容器安全技術監察規程）和GB 150.1-150.4-2011（壓力容器）管轄中國境內的壓力容器。特定壓力容器須向特種設備許可機構（SELO）進行登記。中國風險分類方法與PED不同：邊界條件不同、檢驗機構職能不同，SELO登記並非CE標誌的等效證明。

gap.en: PED classification and Notified Body requirements differ substantially from the Chinese SELO/TSG system. Chinese pressure vessel approvals (TSG/SELO certificates) are not recognised under PED. For heat pump circuits classified as PED Category II or higher, a Notified Body must be engaged. In Germany, TÜV entities and DGUV-accredited bodies are common Notified Bodies. Refrigerant circuit re-design or re-certification to PED categories may be required.
gap.zh: PED分类和公告机构要求与中国SELO/TSG体系存在实质性差异。在中国取得的压力容器批准（TSG/SELO证书）在PED下不被认可。对于被分类为PED第II类或更高类别的热泵回路，须引入公告机构。在德国，TÜV机构和DGUV认可机构是常见的公告机构。制冷剂回路可能需要重新设计或按PED类别重新取证。
gap.zht: PED分類和公告機構要求與中國SELO/TSG體系存在實質性差異。在中國取得的壓力容器批准（TSG/SELO證書）在PED下不被認可。對於被分類為PED第II類或更高類別的熱泵迴路，須引入公告機構。在德國，TÜV機構和DGUV認可機構是常見的公告機構。制冷劑迴路可能需要重新設計或按PED類別重新取證。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (PED + German 14. ProdSV apply to refrigerant circuits meeting pressure/volume thresholds; TÜV/DGUV as Notified Bodies for Category II+)
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (TSG 21/SELO registration for applicable pressure vessels)

source.publisher: EUR-Lex / Official Journal of the European Union

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Major gap — PED classification and Notified Body requirements (TÜV/DGUV in Germany) differ substantially from Chinese SELO/TSG system; existing Chinese pressure vessel approvals not recognised under PED.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 重大差距——PED分类和公告机构要求（德国为TÜV/DGUV）与中国SELO/TSG体系存在实质性差异；现有中国压力容器批准在PED下不被认可。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 重大差距——PED分類和公告機構要求（德國為TÜV/DGUV）與中國SELO/TSG體系存在實質性差異；現有中國壓力容器批准在PED下不被認可。

requirement_topic.en: Refrigerant Circuit Safety — EN 378 System Safety Requirements — Germany / EU
requirement_topic.zh: 制冷剂回路安全——EN 378系统安全要求——德国/欧盟
requirement_topic.zht: 制冷劑迴路安全——EN 378系統安全要求——德國/歐盟

summary.en: Pressure Equipment Directive 2014/68/EU (implemented in Germany via 14. ProdSV) is the mandatory legal framework for refrigerant circuits that meet its pressure, volume, and fluid-group thresholds. EN 378-1:2016+A1:2020, EN 378-2:2016+A1:2019, EN 378-3:2016, and EN 378-4:2016 are voluntary harmonised standards for refrigerating systems and heat pumps; applying them can support a presumption of conformity with relevant EU essential requirements. Germany's VDI 4645 guideline also provides additional technical recommendations for heat-pump installation, including system sizing and refrigerant handling. TA Lärm (Technical Instructions on Noise Protection) sets outdoor noise limits that affect compressor placement for German installations.
summary.zh: 压力设备指令2014/68/EU（在德国通过14. ProdSV实施）是适用于达到其压力、容积和流体组别阈值的制冷剂回路的强制性法律框架。EN 378-1:2016+A1:2020、EN 378-2:2016+A1:2019、EN 378-3:2016和EN 378-4:2016是制冷系统和热泵的自愿协调标准；采用这些标准可支持对相关欧盟基本要求的符合性推定。德国VDI 4645指南还为热泵安装提供额外技术建议，包括系统选型和制冷剂处理。《噪音防护技术指导》（TA Lärm）规定室外噪音限值，影响德国安装中压缩机的布置。
summary.zht: 壓力設備指令2014/68/EU（在德國通過14. ProdSV實施）是適用於達到其壓力、容積和流體組別閾值的制冷劑迴路的強制性法律框架。EN 378-1:2016+A1:2020、EN 378-2:2016+A1:2019、EN 378-3:2016和EN 378-4:2016是制冷系統和熱泵的自願協調標準；採用這些標準可支持對相關歐盟基本要求的符合性推定。德國VDI 4645指南還為熱泵安裝提供額外技術建議，包括系統選型和制冷劑處理。《噪音防護技術指導》（TA Lärm）規定室外噪音限值，影響德國安裝中壓縮機的佈置。

standards_or_laws: TA Lärm (Technical Instructions on Noise Protection)

summary.en: GB 9237-2008 (Safety requirements for refrigerating systems) is China's national adoption of ISO 5149:1993. The current revision status of GB/T 9237 should be verified at time of compliance assessment. Charge limits for flammable refrigerants in indoor environments, room ventilation thresholds, and system documentation requirements differ from EN 378. China has no equivalent to VDI 4645 or TA Lärm noise obligations.
summary.zh: GB 9237-2008（制冷系统安全要求）是中国对ISO 5149:1993的国家采标。GB/T 9237的当前修订状态应在合规评估时予以核查。室内可燃制冷剂充注量限制、房间通风阈值和系统文件要求与EN 378不同。中国没有等同于VDI 4645或TA Lärm噪音义务的规定。
summary.zht: GB 9237-2008（制冷系統安全要求）是中國對ISO 5149:1993的國家採標。GB/T 9237的當前修訂狀態應在合規評估時予以核查。室內可燃制冷劑充注量限制、房間通風閾值和系統文件要求與EN 378不同。中國沒有等同於VDI 4645或TA Lärm噪音義務的規定。

gap.en: EU/German legal compliance must be assessed against PED/14. ProdSV where the refrigerant circuit falls within scope. EN 378 documentation, leak detection, and flammable refrigerant charge-limit methods differ from GB 9237. Germany additionally requires VDI 4645 compliance for heat-pump installations and TA Lärm noise assessments for outdoor units — neither has a Chinese equivalent. These German-specific requirements must be addressed separately from EU CE marking.
gap.zh: 若制冷剂回路落入PED/14. ProdSV范围，欧盟/德国法律合规性须按相应规定评估。EN 378的文件、泄漏检测和可燃制冷剂充注量限制方法与GB 9237不同。德国还要求热泵安装符合VDI 4645，室外机须满足TA Lärm噪音评估要求——这两项均无中国等效规定，须在欧盟CE标志之外单独处理。
gap.zht: 若制冷劑迴路落入PED/14. ProdSV範圍，歐盟/德國法律合規性須按相應規定評估。EN 378的文件、洩漏檢測和可燃制冷劑充注量限制方法與GB 9237不同。德國還要求熱泵安裝符合VDI 4645，室外機須滿足TA Lärm噪音評估要求——這兩項均無中國等效規定，須在歐盟CE標誌之外單獨處理。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal obligation: PED/14. ProdSV applies where pressure/volume/fluid-group thresholds are met; VDI 4645 and TA Lärm apply at installation stage in Germany
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (GB 9237 under fire safety and product safety regime)

source.publisher: EUR-Lex / Official Journal of the European Union

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Gap — PED/14. ProdSV applicability must be classified first; EN 378 is a voluntary harmonised route to presumption of conformity; VDI 4645 and TA Lärm are additional German installation-stage requirements with no Chinese equivalent.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 存在差距——须先判定PED/14. ProdSV适用性；EN 378是取得符合性推定的自愿协调标准路径；VDI 4645和TA Lärm是德国安装阶段的额外要求，中国无等效规定。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 存在差距——須先判定PED/14. ProdSV適用性；EN 378是取得符合性推定的自願協調標準路徑；VDI 4645和TA Lärm是德國安裝階段的額外要求，中國無等效規定。
